How can we reuse a previously computed palindrome to compute a larger palindrome?
If 'aba' is a palindrome, is 'xabax' a palindrome? Yes, since the outer characters match.
Instead of exploring all possible O(n²) substrings, iterate through each character in the string and consider it as the 'center' of a palindrome.
Since a palindrome can have an even or odd length, there are 2n - 1 possible centers. Expand outward from each center and update the maximum length found so far.
